calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn For Order For Issuance Of Earnings W/Holding Order Against Earnings Of Spouse Of Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Mashfiqul Alam's motion to issue an earnings withholding order against the spouse of the judgment debtor is granted. No opposition has been filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jan-14-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
John Bradley, Jr., Esq. for Plaintiff: Mashfiqul Alam..
Order conditionally waiving live Witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Hoon Lee, aka John Lee as follows:
Damages $40,679.00
Prejudgment Interest $4,885.22
Attorney's Fees $6,168.82
Costs $393.50, for a total of $52,126.54
Judgment signed in open court.
